## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Related issues

Link related issues here.

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD

## Validation

- [ ] Backend checks pass locally
- [ ] Frontend checks pass locally
- [ ] Relevant tests added or updated
- [ ] Docs updated when needed

## Screenshots or demo

Attach screenshots or short recordings for UI changes.

## Deployment and risk notes

Call out migration, configuration, or rollout considerations.
